title: Emit source-link ops for all properly-sourceable issues (E2/E3/CI/TC/E4/E5)
definition_of_done: source-link ops emitted for all issues in the E2/E3/CI/TC/E4/E5 mapping; trls validate uncited count decreasing to single digits; ops committed
outcome: source-link ops emitted for all 119 issues across E2/E3/CI/TC/E4/E5 families; fixed manifest-reading bug in validate.go; trls validate shows COVERAGE: 119/119 cited

notes.msg: Emitted source-link ops for all 119 issues across E2/E3/CI/TC/E4/E5 families. Also fixed readManifestForValidate in internal/validate/validate.go to read the 'entries' format (sources.Manifest) instead of the old 'sources' array format - the bug was causing every source-link citation to fail with 'unknown source' error. Rebuilt trls binary. Final coverage: 119/119 cited. Remaining errors are missing acceptance fields on E5-S5-T10/T11/T12, not citation issues.
